paragraphs.text: Side-by-side comparison of all four persistent storage products available across the Nucleon Cloud platform. Tier eligibility is denoted with filled (●) and empty (○) circles per row. All prices in USD, billed monthly per provisioned GB.
Sticky header table — scroll horizontally on narrow viewports.
Select storage types, choose a replication zone, and set a target capacity. This form is illustrative — submission is non-functional on this benchmark page.
Independent side-by-side comparison of cloud hosting tiers — compute, storage, network, and pricing data verified quarterly.
